mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_file_metadata ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_file_metadata (original_filename, stored_filename, file_path, file_size, content_type, entity_type, entity_id, uploaded_by, created_at, language, parent_file_id, translation_status) VALUES (#{originalFilename}, #{storedFilename}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{contentType}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{uploadedBy}, GETDATE(), #{language}, #{parentFileId}, #{translationStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_file_metadata SET original_filename = #{originalFilename}, stored_filename = #{storedFilename}, file_path = #{filePath}, file_size = #{fileSize}, content_type = #{contentType}, entity_type = #{entityType}, entity_id = #{entityId}, uploaded_by = #{uploadedBy}, display_order = #{displayOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_file_metadata WHERE entity_type = #{entityType} AND entity_id = #{entityId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_file_metadata WHERE parent_file_id = #{parentFileId} AND language = #{language}
